query:
SELECT ac.id, ac.competenciaId, c.nome, c.codigoIntegracao, ac.peso, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino 
FROM assessment_competencias ac 
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId
JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.id = ac.assessmentPdiId
WHERE ap.alunoId = 30038
ORDER BY ac.microInicio
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ac.id, ac.competenciaId, c.nome, c.codigoIntegracao, ac.peso, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino 
FROM assessment_competencias ac 
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId
JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.id = ac.assessmentPdiId
WHERE ap.alunoId = 30038
ORDER BY ac.microInicio
LIMIT 20;
